## Product Demo Video

**Duration:** 42 seconds
**Speakers:** 1

### Video Transcript

[00:00-00:05] Welcome to the Contoso Product Demo.

[00:05-00:15] Today we'll be showcasing our latest cloud infrastructure management tool.

[00:15-00:25] As you can see on the dashboard, the system provides real-time monitoring of all deployed resources.

[00:25-00:35] Key features include automated scaling, cost optimization, and security compliance monitoring.

[00:35-00:42] Visit contoso.com/cloud-manager to learn more and start your free trial.
